title: Vlocity DataRaptor Extract DataPack Schema
description: Schema for Vlocity / OmniStudio DataRaptor Extract DataPacks, supporting both managed package (%vlocity_namespace%) and native (OmniDataTransform) schema formats.

Name.description: The name of the DataRaptor Extract, unique in the org.

InputType.description: The type of input format accepted.

OutputType.description: The type of output format produced.

InterfaceObject.description: The primary interface/source object mapping name. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__InterfaceObject__c, Native field: SourceObject.

GlobalKey.description: The global unique key for deployment/migration. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__GlobalKey__c, Native field: GlobalKey.

CheckFieldLevelSecurity.description: Enforce field-level security checks when retrieving data. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__CheckFieldLevelSecurity__c, Native field: IsFieldLevelSecurityEnabled.

IgnoreErrors.description: Whether to ignore non-fatal errors during extraction. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IgnoreErrors__c, Native field: IsErrorIgnored.

RollbackOnError.description: Rollback transaction on error (more relevant for Load but present). Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__RollbackOnError__c, Native field: IsRollbackOnError.

OverwriteAllNullValues.description: Include null values in output rather than omitting them. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__OverwriteAllNullValues__c, Native field: IsNullInputsIncludedInOutput.

OMplusSyncEnabled.description: OMplus synchronization flag (managed package only). Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__OMplusSyncEnabled__c.

Mappings.description: List of mapping items defining query criteria and output mappings.

DomainObjectAPIName.description: The output JSON path or domain object where retrieved field is placed. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__DomainObjectAPIName__c, Native field: DomainObjectAPIName.

DomainObjectFieldAPIName.description: Detailed API name of the target field if mapping directly to SObject (primarily for load but can be present).

InterfaceObjectName.description: The Salesforce SObject API name being queried (e.g., 'Account', 'Contact'). Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__InterfaceObjectName__c, Native field: InterfaceObjectName.

InterfaceFieldAPIName.description: The source SObject field API name being extracted (e.g., 'Name', 'Id', 'BillingStreet') or formula string if mapping item is a formula. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__InterfaceFieldAPIName__c, Native field: InterfaceFieldAPIName.

FilterGroup.description: Grouping index for conditional filters (corresponds to AND/OR groups). Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__FilterGroup__c, Native field: FilterGroup.

FilterOperator.description: The operator to apply when filtering SObjects. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__FilterOperator__c, Native field: FilterOperator.

FilterValue.description: The parameter or literal to match against. Use format 'Id' for input parameters or inline literals. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__FilterValue__c, Native field: FilterValue.

IsDisabled.description: Whether this mapping item is currently disabled. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IsDisabled__c, Native field: IsDisabled.
